title: hibbertia coriacea
intro: Hibbertia coriacea, also known as Guinea flower, is a low-growing, shrubby plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Dilleniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hibbertia coriacea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a tea or infusion, with some studies suggesting its potential use in the development of new pharmaceuticals.
